headline: A Look At Weyerhaeuser (WY) Valuation After 2025 Results And Mixed Multi Year Returns
summary: Weyerhaeuser (WY) is back in focus after reporting 2025 net sales of US$6.9b and net income of US$324 million, prompting investors to reassess the timberland REIT’s recent share performance and income profile. See our latest analysis for Weyerhaeuser. At a share price of US$25.03, Weyerhaeuser has a 30 day share price return of 5.84%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 4.41% contrasts with a 5 year total shareholder return decline of 20.74%, suggesting momentum has been mixed.
